rules.rule: Steps execute in declared order; out-of-order execution is a safety violation.
A step is enterable only when all declared preconditions are satisfied.
Procedures declare ≥1 checkpoint; checkpoints are safe restart anchors.
Transitions to unsafe states require explicit user confirmation + warning surface.
Steps marked `confirmation_required=true` cannot be auto-completed by an assistant.
A procedure is complete only when its terminal state is reached AND its validation predicate passes.
Absence of error is not completion; completion is positively asserted by validation predicate.
Given the same starting state + inputs, execution traces are reproducible.
